Business profile

span.p:
Short-lived E2B sandbox
Unknown files stay outside the always-on service

Evidence bundle
Document status, SHA256, deadlines, requirement-like lines, source snippets

span.p:
Cohere Command A+
Canadian model reasoning inside E2B

search_extracted_documents
get_bid_evidence

span.p:
Double validation
Strict JSON in sandbox, then host validation

div.style: color: rgb(36, 20, 61) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bid-room artifact
Recommendation, fit score, requirements, risks, missing info, questions, next actions

div.style: color: rgb(51, 24, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Pass
Document why, avoid bad fit

div.style: color: rgb(51, 24, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Maybe
Ask clarifying questions, fill missing info

div.style: color: rgb(51, 24, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pursue
Assign estimator, calendar deadlines, prepare compliance package

div.style: color: rgb(51, 24, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Daily habit and community
Free bid brief first, pricing only after trust
